items.text:
Stell dir vor, du wirst endlich als Schauspieler ernst genommen.

Genau das ist der Punkt, an dem viele Quereinsteiger stehen, die eigentlich für die Bühne oder die Kamera bestimmt sind – aber nie die richtige Möglichkeit bekommen haben.

Dieses Jahr öffnen wir wieder Plätze in unserer berufsbegleitenden Schauspielausbildung. Und ehrlich gesagt suchen wir keine „perfekten Lebensläufe“.

Wir suchen echte Persönlichkeiten.

Menschen mit Ecken, Kanten, Geschichten.

Menschen, die schon lange spüren, dass mehr in ihnen steckt.

Vielleicht bist genau du jemand, der bisher übersehen wurde.

Vielleicht hat dir nur der richtige Rahmen gefehlt, um dein Talent ernsthaft zu entwickeln.

Wenn dich das anspricht, schreib mir einfach „**Schauspiel**“ in die Kommentare oder schick mir eine Nachricht und erzähl mir kurz von dir.

items.text:
Recognize the aspects of your Fantasy Self that are not in alignment with the reality of your life. 

Daydreaming about your talents without acting on them is self-defeating

As Denzel Washington said:  “A goal without actions is merely a dream.”

What small action can you take today to get a little bit more grounded in making your fantasy self into your own reality?

#fantasy #action #artist #actor

items.text:
POTNIA THERON de HÉLIA CORREIA

27 FEVEREIRO A 7 MARÇO
Quarta a Sábado às 21h30

AUDITÓRIO MUNICIPAL DO
FÓRUM CULTURAL DO SEIXAL

info e reservas 932 195 570 | reservas.teatrodaterra@gmail.com

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal, Biblioteca Municipal e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/172158-potnia_theron_de_helia_correia-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um epíteto e um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um rasgo, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA 
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
assistência de encenação
BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO

encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO DA TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
🎬 **CALLING ALL ACTORS, ACTRESSES & COMEDIANS IN LOS ANGELES!** 🎭

We’re holding an **open casting call** for **“Lock the GDam Doors”** and **two additional projects** currently in production under HMS Castings!

📅 **Saturday, Nov 8th — 1PM sharp**
📍 **17661 Yukon Ave, Torrance, CA 90504**
🎥 **Bring headshots**

I’ve personally had the privilege of working with these filmmakers for the past **11 months**, and they’re genuinely an amazing group of people. We’ve built a **strong creative community here in Los Angeles**, and we’re laying the groundwork for **consistent film production** with multiple projects in motion.

👉 **Note:** This is a **non-paid opportunity** at this stage, but it’s a chance to be part of a **growing film community** that’s building from the ground up toward **bigger productions and long-term collaboration.**

This is a great opportunity to **get in on the ground floor of something big** and be part of a growing network of passionate artists and storytellers.

📧 **For more info:** hmscastings@gmail.com
📞 **For sides or questions:** (661) 417-7664

items.text:
Actors, We have an amazing free industry talk and Q&A with legendary casting director Jane Jenkins on Saturday, November 15th at 11:00 AM PST on Zoom. 

Jane is one of the most influential casting directors in Hollywood history, with a career spanning over 190 film and television projects, including Jurassic Park, Harry Potter, The Princess Bride, Stand By Me, Ghost, Home Alone, Apollo 13, A Few Good Men, The Godfather, Nixon, and Casino Royale, just to name a few. She’s helped launch the careers of many actors we love and admire today! 

Do join us for this free event, Jane's stories from casting and her insights are nothing short of extraordinary! Head over to our link tree to rsvp!

items.text:
Kom til audition - Det bliver en kæmpe fest 🤩🤘🎸🔥

Se mere: https://malstroem.dk/audition/

sharedPost.text:
Sidste år bragede vi igennem med Rock’n’Glam ⚡

Til efteråret tager vi den endnu længere ud med Rock of Ages 🤘

Har du lyst til at stå på scenen og blive en del af årets vildeste rockmusical?

Du behøver ikke være sceneveteran — entusiasme, mod og kærlighed til rockmusik bringer dig langt.

Læs mere og tilmeld dig audition her:
https://malstroem.dk/audition/

(Billeder fra Rock’n’Glam — foto: Tina Liv)

items.text:
TV 2 søger mennesker på mellem 20-40 år, som er klar til at udforske intimitet, nærhed og sig selv.  

På et 2-ugers retreat i Sydeuropa i smukke og trygge omgivelser bliver du en del af et fællesskab med andre mennesker i samme situation. Her bliver du støttet og guidet af et team af landets bedste sexologer og terapeuter.  

Det er hverken dating eller en konkurrence. Det handler ikke om at præstere, men om at lære dig selv bedre at kende - i dit eget tempo og med respekt for dine grænser.  

Hvem ved - måske tager du hjem med en større ro, mere mod og en ny tro på, at nærhed og relationer også kan være noget for dig. 

Måske er det ikke dig, men en du kender, der kunne have glæde af et luksuriøst retreat og et trygt fællesskab.  

Vil du helt uforpligtende høre mere, og har du nogle spørgsmål, så skriv på denne mail:
cast@nordiskfilmtv.com eller læs mere om tv-programmet og ansøg via dette link: https://shortaudition.com/TV2program

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, television and text that says 'TV 2 soger medvirkende til nyt TV-program Er du jomfru? Er du nervos for, om du nogensinde fảr en kaereste? Eller har du det (ligesom mange andre!) bare svaert ved intimitet? Sảe du ikke alene TV soger modige danskere til e varmt TV-program om voksne mennesker, som er klar il at udforsk intimitet, naerhed og sig selv.'

items.text:
**STATISTER SØGES - LØNNET**

Pænt goddag! 

GotFat mangler 5 friske statister (3 mænd og 2 kvinder i alderen 25-35 år) til en ny kampagnefilm for Mediehusene i Silkeborg!

Vi skal filme en hyggelig morgen ved bålet d. 8. april, og da det er en hurtig opgave (kl. 06:15 - 07:30) kan du sagtens nå resten af dagens gøremål efterfølgende 🙌🏼

* **Honorar:** 500 kr. i B-honorar pr. person.
* **Kontakt:** Send navn og billede til **lassepablo@gotfat.dk**

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'GOTFAT PRODUCTIONS STATISTER SOGES: Hygge omkring bälet Har duog dine venner lyst Silkeborg? enhyggelig GotfatProduction seger 5statister til optagelser Mediehusene Salkeborg 8 leder efter (ldereftrengruppe.derknsidde en gruppe der kan sidde og hygge omkringe bải +mmeget mà megetger gerne Info om opgaven: Hvem: og g2 kvinder alder 25- Hvornar: Tidlige Huondr:Tidligermorgenoptogelser morgenoptagelser ca. 7:30) sagtensn arbejde studie bagefter! Honorar: Der gives statist. tB honorar pà 500 Interesserot? lassepablo@gotfat.dk hurtigst muligt. Vì glooder os here ira er!'

items.summary:
**STATISTER SØGES - LØNNET**

Pænt goddag! 

GotFat mangler 5 friske statister (3 mænd og 2 kvinder i alderen 25-35 år) til en ny kampagnefilm for Mediehusene i Silkeborg!

Vi skal filme en hyggelig morgen ved bålet d. 8. april, og da det er en hurtig opgave (kl. 06:15 - 07:30) kan du sagtens nå resten af dagens gøremål efterfølgende 🙌🏼

* **Honorar:** 500 kr. i B-honorar pr. person.
* **Kontakt:** Send navn og billede til **lassepablo@gotfat.dk**

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

items.title: KOMPARSE.DE

topComments.text:
Falls , nicht schon geschehen,  solltest du vernünftige Fotos haben mit denen du dich bei Komparse.de  oder Agenturen bewerben kannst. Diese wollen mindestens 4 Fotos, davon ein Profilfoto, ein Ganzkörperfoto, vor neutralem hellen Hintergrund. Jeweils einmal lächelnd und einmal neutraler Gesichtsausdruck. Mit deinem Facebook Profil  wirst du da kaum, eher null Chancen haben irgendwo gebucht zu werden. 
Man muss schon Aktiv werden, nicht jedem fallen die Komparsen Jobs in den Schoß! 
Auch würde ich bei Gesuchen etwas mehr schreiben,  wie nur, "Hallo ich suche Job" überspitzt ausgedrückt! 
Viel Erfolg bei der Suche! 
Gruß

Hallo zusammen,

für eine Barszene in Berlin-Charlottenburg suchen wir noch einige Darsteller:innen ab ca. 25 Jahren, die Lust haben mitzuspielen und die Szene lebendig zu machen.

📍 Ort: Berlin-Charlottenburg
🗓️Wann: Sonntag 22.02; 13:30 - 15:00
🕒 Dauer: ca. 1,5 Stunden
🍽 Verpflegung: vor Ort inklusive
💰 Vergütung: 100€

Gedreht wird eine atmosphärische Szene in einer Bar – es geht um authentische Hintergrundmomente und Interaktion. Schauspielerfahrung ist nicht zwingend erforderlich, natürliche Präsenz ist wichtiger.

sharedPost.text:
---

🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype

"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name

🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

---

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.

---

🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach)

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill

📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):

1. Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."

2. The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"

3. Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.

4. Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.

5. Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call

📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

---

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable

🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point

📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision.

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

---

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew

🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.

Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)

🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

---

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape

📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:

1. Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.

2. Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.

3. Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:

1. Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

2. Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.

3. Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux

📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

---

Final Performance (Day 4):

Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

---

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?

This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:

mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com

Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM

Hi everyone,

I’m the producer of a university short film based in Kingston, London. We are currently casting three roles for an upcoming student production.

This is a non-commercial project. Travel expenses and meals will be covered.

Location: Kingston, London

Shoot dates: 2–3 days, mid-March

We are looking for actors who can speak Mandarin Chinese.

Logline:

At the beginning of a new semester, Chu meets a transfer student, Jiang. As Chu finds herself unexpectedly drawn to Jiang, her previously close relationship with Zhao begins to shift. Chu struggles to understand whether her feelings toward Jiang are a desire for friendship or something deeper.

Roles:

Chu – Female, playing age 17–18 (actors 16–26 welcome)

Introverted, emotionally sensitive.

Jiang – Female, playing age 17–18 (actors 16–26 welcome)

Quiet, observant. Appears cold and elegant but has a warm heart.

Ear piercings preferred.

Zhao – Male, playing age 17–18 (actors 16–26 welcome)

Reserved, confident presence.

To apply, please send your headshot and CV to:

chenqingchuan092025@outlook.com

K2523900@kingston.ac.uk

Kingston University student production.

#castingcall #castingcalluk

items.text:
I am looking for a student to join me on a YouTube project in London 🌆

The role involves approaching people in the street, asking a set of prepared questions on camera 🎤, and having short, natural conversations. It is light, fun, and engaging work, but you should feel confident speaking to strangers and comfortable on camera 🙂

You should be a native English speaker (or very close), cheerful, outgoing, and positive ✨

Filming sessions are usually 6 to 8 hours per day ⏰ and this will be an ongoing project.

I offer £13 per hour (ONO) 💷 plus paid lunch 🍔

If this sounds like something you would enjoy, please send me a DM with a short introduction about yourself 📩

items.text:
Hi all,
North East based actor with availability June / July and the beginning of August.

items.title: Hi all,

items.text:
CASTING CALL!! HENRY'S GHOST - A COVID-19 STORY
# A lonely widower, driven by the aftermath of COVID-19 isolation, attempts to prove to his son the presence of a spirit haunting his flat, whom he quietly believes to be his wife.

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

From Director ***Jacob James Ward*** with previous works such as *'Fallowfield' *and *'he lives here'* which are currently on the festival circuit, comes a film experience with foundations deep within the essential worker communities affected by COVID-19. 

CASTING FOR
# ***HENRY STONE ***
## ***45 - 55 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Henry, a veteran bus driver struggling with survivors guilt, lives as a stoic, working class representation of the mismanagement of the COVID era in the UK. While working as a bus driver at the height of COVID, Henry slowly saw the toll the pandemic had on his social infrastructure - losing friends, and eventually, his wife.  Now, years later with little attempt to process his tragic loss, he makes an attempt to fill the void created by his loneliness by slowly falling down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories and is disillusioned by the prospect of a ghost living in his flat who he believes to be his late wife. In a desperate attempt, he tries to convince it's existence to his son. 

# ***JAMES STONE ***
## ***20 - 25 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Despite living a life surviving it all, Henry can now only be saved by his lone son - James.

James, burdened by the pressures of university, his job and his father's declining mental state, represents the loss of youth and importance of growing responsibility brought on by COVID for young people. James sorely wants to reconnect with his father and help them both move on from the death of James' mother. James must convince his father to stop looking for the dead and start talking to the living - which is easier said than done. 

# *EXTRAS WANTED!!*
## ***20 - 60 YEARS OLD ***
## ***ANY GENDER ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

We are seeking extras to portray Henry's co-workers in a key sequence that explores and visualises his grief and survivor's guilt. 

If you're interested in being part of this important scene and enhancing the world that we are building, please get in touch!!

***CREW:***

DIRECTOR - JJ Ward 

PRODUCER - George Grant 

CINEMATOGRAPHER - Jack Gaskell 

EDITOR - Matthew Wadham 

SOUND DESIGNER - Jacob Kelly 

Our entire crew has a powerful personal connection to COVID, with myself (the Director) having been locked down during my formative years between GCSEs and A-LEVELs. Many more of you out there will have your own Covid story and we'd love to hear from you!

If this sounds like something you'd be interested working on, with an experienced crew looking to take this to film festivals and beyond, then please get in touch! We'll be sending over script segments and asking for self tapes at this time, with studio auditions to come later :) 

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

SPEAK SOON!

CONTACTS:
* Message me on this account :)
* Email the director: jacobward044@gmail.com
* Email the producer: georgefgrant@icloud.com

JAMES STONE MALE 20-25 YEARS OLD ETHNICITY: ANY JAMES, BURDENED BY THE PRESSURES OF UNIVERSITY, HIS JOB AND HIS FATHER'S MENTAL STATE, REPRESENTS THE LOSS OF YOUTH AND IMPORTANCE OF GROWING RESPONSIBILITY BROUGHT ON BY COVID FOR YOUNG PEOPLE. FILMING EARLY To MID APRIL CONTACT INFO: GEORGEFGRANT GEORGEFGRANT@ICLOUD.COM @ICLOUD.COM'

items.text: Just a few places available on our Screen acting  Hollyoaks course in Media City Salford  🎬

sharedPost.text:
We are excited to announce a new four-week Hollyoaks course featuring industry experts for ages 16+. 
 
The 4th week of the course will be led by Gill Charnock a prominent Liverpool-based Casting Director at Lime Pictures/ Hollyoaks and member of the CDG. With over 30 years of experience, Gill is best known for casting over 350 episodes of Hollyoaks, as well as projects such as Brookside, Grange Hill, and Zero Chill.
 
We are also thrilled to welcome HOLLYOAKS ACTOR  ASHLEY TAYLOR DAWSON, who has played Darren Osborne on Hollyoaks since 1999. Ashley will teach a screen acting session focusing on Hollyoaks on the course. 

Course Dates: Sunday March 8th/ March 15th/ March 22nd/ March 29th 
 
Full Course Fee: £175

click the link below to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/new-hollyoaks-course-march/

items.text:
KRAKÓW

Hej! 👋

Poszukuje 4 osób do udziału w sesji zdjęciowej oraz nagraniach contentowych (proste, luźne role pod aktualne trendy) dla lokalu gastronomiczno-rozrywkowego w Krakowie. 🎉

Kogo szukamy?

- Wiek: 20–30 lat

- Swoboda przed kamerą

Kiedy? 03.03.2026

Forma współpracy: barter - vouchery do lokalu 🎟️

Jeśli masz ochotę wziąć udział odezwij się w komentarzu lub w wiadomości prywatnej! 📩

Do zobaczenia! 🙌

Agencja Abe Studio poszukuje  do serialu dublera p.Zbigniewa Zamachowskiego na plan filmowy,który odbędzie się pod koniec tego miesiąca (brak konkretnej daty planu)
Ważne :trzeba mieć prawo jazdy kat B

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać:
-imię i nazwisko,
-wiek,
-zdjęcia (sylwetka, twarz)
-nr kontaktowy 

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na adres abe.statysta@gmail.com z dopiskiem „dubler”

Greetings, just introducing myself to the group. I'm a multi-hyphenate focusing mostly on writing at the moment. I just released this resource for actors. 

If you can use some extra ammunition to set you apart from the herd, there are a great range of monologues from comic to dramatic. I'll even send a starving actor a read-only link in exchange for feedback to support the cause. Just message me!😀

items.text:
Hi there! Just wanted some advice on this, I’m a drama graduate and I really want to get into the casting and talent management side of the industry. The dream is to become a casting assistant/PA and work my way up to be a casting director one day! I’m based in the North West but all the vacancies I’ve been seeing on CGD and PMA have all been London based. 
Please let me know if any tips or anyone I can get into contact with regarding this. 
Thank you in advance!

topComments.text: Speak to LA productions and other independent companies. They might have some work experience vacancies.

items.text:
**Hey San Diego!**

We are casting **Production Assistants and Brand Ambassadors (Female) **for a Halara event Nov + Dec in San Diego!

Brand Ambassadors (Female) must be comfortable operating a Shopify POS system, friendly, kind, outgoing and personable.

Production Assistants must be willing and capable to do manual labor which includes lifting boxes, moving boxes, organizing inventory and taking out trash.

*MUST be available all dates with no conflicts to apply.*

*MUST be willing to work as San Diego Local. Travel/Lodging are not provided. *

**EVENT DETAILS: Halara San Diego**

**Location: **San Diego, CA

**Dates:**
Production Assistants: 11.6 - 11.10
Brand Ambassadors: 11.21 - 12.14
**Off Thanksgiving Day, 11.27*

**Production Assistants Dates/Times:**

Thursday Nov 6th: 6:30AM - 4:30PM
Friday Nov 7th: 8AM - 6PM
Saturday Nov 8th: 8AM - 6PM
Sunday Nov 9th: 8AM - 6PM
Monday Nov 10th: 8AM - 6PM

Monday Dec 15th: 7AM - 5PM
Tuesday Dec 16th: 6:30AM - 4:30PM

**Brand Ambassador Dates/Times:**

Friday - Sunday Nov 21st - Dec 24th: 9AM - 3PM (Shift 1)
Friday - Sunday Nov 21st - Dec 24th: 3PM - 9PM (Shift 2)
**Off Thanksgiving Day, Nov 27th*

Rate: $25/hr

**To APPLY as a BRAND AMBASSADOR, please DM us on Instagram:**

- Headshot
- # of years BA Experience:
- Brands worked with:
- Skills:
- Any cute FYI:

**To APPLY as a PRODUCTION ASSISTANT, please DM us on Instagram:**

- Headshot
- Experience as a PA:

Our Instagram:
[www.instagram.com/shesocorporate](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.instagram.com/shesocorporate)
@shesocorporate

Please apply ASAP - this is an Urgent Casting! We look forward to hearing from you! 😊

items.text:
[CASTING CALL]

Hello people!

We're looking for two Black, male actors aged roughly between 25-30 to play the lead roles in our short film, 'Zen'. All travel costs will be covered, food will be provided, and we'll pay a small amount for your time on set. (The film will be entered to festivals!)

Logline: Outside for the first time in his life, a humanoid robot struggles with the simple task of getting milk. Meanwhile, his creator discovers a terrible truth.

Visual concept for the film: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O1kt7Y4fj4k](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O1kt7Y4fj4k&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHoyXxZdPduUJhj6w_cGlh57G06oMWadd6BJEPMb7kBtz9_N3K0qikVdCFoYt_aem_UA8eANd_sbdtZzFufm-6Cg)

The roles:

Von (shooting in Farnham, Surrey on 16th, 18th & 19th March) - Anxious, reserved and afraid of change. He built a robot named Zen to accompany him in his isolated home.

Zen (shooting in Farnham, Surrey on 17th, 18th & 20th March) - A humanoid robot with childlike curiosity and eagerness for change. Though he looks human, he interprets the world very literally and his speech is stiff and robotic.

If you or anyone you know is interested in either of these roles, please reach out to me here or message my producer at 07393 196080. Be prepared to record a self tape for the role!

Best,

Meadow

Meanwhile, his creator discovers α terrible truth. Contact 07393 196080 23093180 2309318@students.ucreative.c.uok Filming to take place in Farnham, Surrey, March 2026'

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – COMMUNITY NOTICE

We’re student filmmakers casting our final short film, Community Notice  set during a community meeting about a missing cat, and the tensions that quietly surface in the room.

We’re looking for strong, naturalistic performers across a range of roles. 

📍 Filming in Belfast
💰 Paid 

As this is an independent student production, we’re also currently fundraising to support the film’s production costs. If you’d like to support the project.

https://gofund.me/f58297f42

To apply, send your headshot, showreel (if available), and a short introduction to:
📩 communitynoticeshortfilm@gmail.com

Selected applicants will receive self - tape materials 

Thanks 
Lucy Young 
(Writer & Director)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call CHAIRPERSON Any gender Playing age 20-45 Procedural. Measured. Clinging to order. Knows this meeting isn't about cat - - and doesn't want it t to go there. A restrained, controlled performance. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfim@gmail.com short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Declan Male| Playinga age 18-25 Restless. Slightly defensive. Detached on the surface. Carries more awareness than he lets show. Looking for subtle internal tension rather than overt attitude. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call PATRICK Male Playing age 55-70 Blunt. Defensive. Certain he's being practical. Represents a generation that mistakes emotional distance for strength. This role requires subtlety not villain. • How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and a short introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotilm@gmail.com Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call NIAMH Female Playing age 25-35 Earnest. Polite. Conflict-averse. Wants harmony at any cost even it means avoiding the truth. Needs naturalistic delivery and quiet comedic timing. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.c short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call ROSE Female|Playing.age45-60 Playing age Quiet. Watchful. Says very little. Feels like she knows more than she lets on. A presence role. Strong screen stillness essential. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfilm@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

An upcoming near-future, sci-fi short film, written and directed by Dylan Burrows.

items.text:
CASTING DO REKLAMY PRODUKTU HIGIENICZNEGO
Poszukujemy dwóch kobiet do udziału w kampanii reklamowej produktu higienicznego.

Kogo szukamy?

🔹 Nastolatka (ok. 15–18 lat)�🔹 Kobieta w wieku 25–32 lata

Wymagania:

* naturalność i swoboda przed kamerą

* umiejętność wyrażania emocji (zakłopotanie, radość, ulga, pewność siebie)

* dobra prezencja i zadbany wygląd

* komunikatywność i otwartość

* mile widziane doświadczenie w pracy przed kamerą (nie jest wymagane)

Oferta płatna

Więcej informacji odnośnie materiałów które należy przesłać PRIV 

Zapraszamy do udziału! 🌿

topComments.text:
Bardzo chętnie wezmę udział w zleceniu
Zapraszam do kontaktu przez maila, instagrama lub messengera mail: lilaniebo@gmail.com 
Ig: https://www.instagram.com/lilaniebo/
Pf: https://casting.studio/artists/11063/LilianaM
Wzrost 180, wymiary: 90/62/96
Warszawa

items.text:
SERIAL DOKUMENTALNY TRUE CRIME 

WARSZAWA i okolice

28.02 / 1.03

140-170zł 💵

Do nowego serialu dokumentalnego w formule true crime poszukuję statystów wg poniższej rozpiski.

28.02/1.03 - kontynuacja, 170zł/dzień
* KLAUDEK - mężczyzna, max 175cm wzrostu, ciemne blond włosy, noszący okulary (mile widziane, nie konieczne)

28.02 - stawka 140zł
* PACIOR - mężczyzna, wysoki, łysy, wiek 30+

Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na adres: patrycja@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: nazwa postaci

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość oraz ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + ZDJĘCIE DŁONI (dłonie zadbane, paznokcie naturalne!).

Zgłoszenia bez zdjęcia dłoni nie będą brane pod uwagę.

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING - EPIZODYŚCI / EPIZODYSTKI** 🎭

Szukamy **epizodystów i epizodystek** do nowego, autorskiego  projektu realizowanego na YouTube  **Bracia Donati**.

👉 Format: **krótki, typowo YouTubowy**, z wyraźnym **zabarwieniem komediowym**.
👉 Poniżej w poście znajdziecie **link do naszej produkcji** – zachęcamy, żeby sprawdzić klimat i formę materiału. 

Pierwsze 4** **odcinki dostępne już na YT
🔎 Kogo szukamy?
* kobiet i mężczyzn 18+
* do **jedno­dniowych epizodów (parę godzin)**
* z możliwością **dalszej współpracy** przy kolejnych realizacjach
📍 Lokalizacja
* zdjęcia realizujemy **w Ostrowie Wielkopolskim i okolicach**
* preferujemy osoby z **bliskiej okolicy**
* zapewniamy **transport do 20 km**
⏰ Godziny zdjęć
* kręcimy głównie **w godzinach porannych**
* start ok. **9:00** do **15:00** max 
* większość scen realizowana jest **w knajpie**
🍽️ Co zapewniamy?
* **ciepły posiłek na planie**
* **dojazd (do 20 km)**
* **luźną, miłą atmosferę** **i możliwość pogrania**
ℹ️ Ważne

Projekt na tym etapie jest **non-profit** - nie przewidujemy wynagrodzenia finansowego, oferujemy ciepły posiłek, transport i udział w produkcji.

📩 **Zainteresowanych zapraszamy do kontaktu**
- napiszcie **wiadomość prywatną** lub zostawcie **komentarz pod postem**.
Chętnie udzielimy więcej informacji.

Pozdrawiamy i do zobaczenia na planie!
👇
**Link do kanału z naszą twórczością poniżej**

[https://www.youtube.com/@michaonyszkiewicz7968](https://www.youtube.com/@michaonyszkiewicz7968)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '原 B R BAR BRACIA DONATI'

items.text:
🎭 BIG NEWS! Something special is coming to Kraków this June.
We are thrilled to announce the call for proposals for our very first SoloStage Festival! We’re

looking for the bold, the brave, and the solo. Whether you have a finished show or a burning

idea, we want you on our stage.

✨ Focus: Community, creativity, and the power of one.

📅 When: June 2026

🔗 Apply here: www.ettc.pl/SoloStage

Note: As a non-profit, we focus our funds on the stage. While we can't provide housing, we

CAN provide a platform and a community. Join us!

#SoloStageFestival #PolishTheatre #CallForArtists #SoloPerformance

items.text:
**casting – 2 główne role do projektu reklamowego WARSZAWA**

szukamy dwóch głównych bohaterów do komercyjnej sesji zdjęciowej.

prawa bezterminowe, na cały świat. główne rynki: usa i kanada. projekt płatny (wynagrodzenie + wykup praw).

rola 1: fotograf (kobieta)

33–35 lat. wygląda młodo, ale z doświadczeniem i pewnością siebie. niesłowiański typ urody (nie blondynka/jasny brąz z niebieskimi oczami). dowolna etniczność lub mix, z wyłączeniem wyraźnie afroamerykańskiego typu urody. mile widziana różnorodność, ale najważniejsza jest charyzma i silna obecność przed kamerą (np. kręcona ruda). dowolna sylwetka.

rola 2: barista (mężczyzna)

20+. ciemne włosy (mogą być nieco dłuższe), broda, typ hipsterski. tatuaże mile widziane. ciemniejsza karnacja będzie atutem.

ważne: kandydat nie może mieć silnej obecności na dużych platformach stockowych ani niedawnych współprac reklamowych z oprogramowaniem do edycji zdjęć lub narzędziami dla fotografów.

termin zdjęć: 17, 19 lub 24 marca (do potwierdzenia).

zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej: wiek, numer telefonu, wymiary, aktualne zdjęcia oraz video-wizytówka.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 9/2026

DER FINALE FIGHT IN WOODSBORO UND OSCARANWÄRTER TIMOTHY CHALAMET 

Entschlossen ihre Familie zu beschützen, ist Sidney gezwungen, sich dem Schrecken aus ihrer Vergangenheit zu stellen, um das Blutbad ein für alle Mal zu beenden in SCREAM 7. 

Schuhverkäufer Marty hat nur ein Ziel im Leben: Weltmeister im Tischtennis zu werden und somit in den Olymp der gefeierten Athleten aufzusteigen. Die Rolle des MARTY SUPREME könnte für den Hauptdarsteller zum Gewinn des Oscars reichen.

Natürlich gibt es auch in dieser Sendung Interviews unter anderem mit Isabella Willinger, Elly Senger-Weiss oder Ganaël Dumreicher aus der Kooperation mit Cinema Next.

Abgerundet wird die Sendung wie immer mit Musik aus den Soundtracks der letzten 85 Jahre.

Mittwoch 25.2.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.title: 5-minutters kage – Du kommer til at bage denne kage hver dag! Hurtig og nem opskrift

items.text:
Slut med at stege pommes frites! Prøv denne nye opskrift på bare 5 minutter, og du vil blive overrasket over, hvor lækker den er! Sprød, smagfuld og så meget sundere – dette hurtige alternativ til traditionelle pommes frites bliver din nye yndlingssnack.

We’re scouting experienced baseball players for a PAID TV commercial shooting in Cape Town in early March 2026.

- Experienced Baseball Players (Pitchers / Batters / Umpires)
- Men, 25–35 years
- Any ethnicity

Feel free to tag or share with any baseball players in Cape Town who should see this!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎬
We are 5th year MA students from University of Asia and the Pacific, and we are inviting you to be part of our 15 Min Short Film!

Handa ka na bang maging bahagi ng isang kuwentong puno ng alaala at muling pagkikita? 🎥

🗓 Application Period: February 20–25�

📧 Send applications to: primaproductions8@gmail.com�

✉️ Subject line format: CHARACTER – YOUR NAME�Ex: ALBA – MARIA AQUINO

🎬 Final shooting dates: 3rd week of March

📌 Kindly check our pubmats for more details�

⚠️ NOTE: This short film is a student-led project, PURELY FOR ACADEMIC PURPOSES

 LOGLINE: 

After the passing of his separated wife, an estranged father reconnects with his daughter after nearly a decade. The two live in different worlds, the daughter works in corporate, making a name for herself in her industry while the father is near rock bottom. In a desperate attempt to feel closer to her, the father recreates meals that the late mother has made in the past. Each meal recalling a simpler time, with tastes and flavors the daughter had nearly forgotten, slowly reconnecting her to her childhood.

Prima Productions is looking for actors who can portray:

🎭 ARTURO (Father, late 40s)�• Height: 5’6–5’10�• Preferably moreno (open to all complexions)�• Can speak Tagalog (English is a plus)�• Musically gifted is a plus (singing or playing instruments such as guitar or piano)�

Character: A broken yet hopeful father trying to reconnect with his daughter through food, memories, and music.

🎭 ALBA (Daughter, mid-20s)�• Height: 5’3–5’6�• Preferably morena (open to all complexions)�• Can speak both Tagalog and English�

Character: A driven corporate professional carrying emotional distance from her past, slowly rediscovering warmth and nostalgia.

items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT MOCKUMENTARY FILM

We are casting speaking roles and male athlete extras for RAPID, a 10-minute mockumentary graduation film produced as part of the BA Filmmaking course at UWE Bristol.

The film will be shot in Bristol from 2nd–6th March 2026. This is a student project, unpaid with travel expenses and food provided, intended for university assessment, portfolio use, and festival submission.

STORY:

RAPID follows a small documentary crew as they capture former sprint star Ian Hitchworth’s attempted comeback through a chaotic charity race. 

Told in a deadpan mockumentary style, the film blends awkward comedy with moments of vulnerability. 

Humour comes through stillness, micro-expressions, and uncomfortable silences — very performance-led and character-driven.

SPEAKING ROLES:

SHOP CUSTOMER
Female, 60+
Small speaking role confronting Ian in the sports shop where he works. Dry, natural delivery.

SAM – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Sarcastic and cynical. Quietly undermines Ian with dry interrogation and subtle looks to camera. Comedy comes through restraint.

DUNCAN – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Slow-witted but fascinated by the camera. Emotionless, slightly odd presence. Competing in the trial with no real passion — just wants something to do.

EXTRAS:

MALE ATHLETE EXTRAS – CHANGING ROOM & RACE SCENES
Male, 18–35
Looking for male extras to play track athletes in changing room and race scenes.

Comfortable in sportswear and performing in a natural mockumentary-style environment. Strong reactions and subtle on-camera presence important.

Great opportunity to gain on-set experience, receive a screen credit, and obtain showreel material.

KEY INFO:
📍 Location: Bristol
📅 Shoot dates: 2nd–6th March 2026 (likely one day only for most roles)
💼 Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)

TO APPLY:
Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to:
📩 rapidfilm2026@gmail.com

May be an image of text

Comfortable in sportswear and performing in a natural mockumentary-style environment. Strong reactions and subtle on-camera presence important.

Great opportunity to gain on-set experience, receive a screen credit, and obtain showreel material.

KEY INFO:
📍 Location: Bristol
📅 Shoot dates: 2nd–6th March 2026 (likely one day only for most roles)
💼 Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)

TO APPLY:
Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to:
📩 rapidfilm2026@gmail.com
items.title: 📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT MOCKUMENTARY FILM

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 42 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
**TITLE:** A Thirst That Kills 

**GENRE: **Dark Drama / Tragedy 

**LOGLINE:** Desperate to reclaim the woman he loves, a drowning alcoholic reaches for anything to stay afloat, only to discover some lifelines pull you under faster.  

**ROLES: **

**Keith - **18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Keith is a charming, intelligent, emotionally articulate man who drinks because sobriety would force him to sit alone with himself. He’s not a stereotype drunk. He’s functional, witty, and painfully self-aware. That’s what makes him dangerous to himself. Keith doesn’t believe he’s worthless. That’s the tragedy. He believes he’s almost worth saving. If he could just get Cassie back, just get through tonight, just take the edge off, then maybe tomorrow he’ll fix everything. Tomorrow never comes.

**Cassie - **18-38 / Female / Any Ethnicity - Cassie is strong, compassionate, and exhausted. She is not cold, she’s done bleeding. Loving Keith cost her too much of herself, and she finally chose survival over hope. She still loves him. That’s what makes her boundary so painful. Cassie isn’t rejecting Keith out of cruelty or anger; she’s rejecting the cycle. Every word she speaks to him is careful, restrained, and heavy with history.

**Robert** - 18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Robert is Keith’s mirror, what Keith could look like if he cleaned up just enough to function. He’s not malicious, not reckless, not stupid. He’s human. Robert wants to help Keith, but he wants to help without sacrifice. He doesn’t want confrontation, ultimatums, or responsibility. Giving Keith Percocet feels like kindness, like pragmatism. It’s easier than saying, “You need real help,” because that would force Robert to examine his own habits.

**PRODUCTION COMPANY: **A UCCS student film, directed by **Brett Nagy, **written** **by** Brett Nagy** and produced by **Tyla Stogsdill.**

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie / short film.

**CONTACT INFORMATION:** athirstthatkillsfilm@gmail.com

**RUN TIME:** 10 min short.

**COMPENSATION: **Non-Paid.

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union.

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Saturday -** **February 28, 2026. Location: UCCS Campus - El Pomar Center 103 (directions will be sent by email)

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE:** one 12 hour shoot day held on Wednesday - March 25, 2026.

sharedPost.text:
Wow😮🔥So Amazing 🔥From the studio to the stage (and everywhere in between), our dancers work hard to ensure their moves are flawless.
🥰Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m a 21-year-old dark skin model currently based in Poland and available nationwide.

Height: 194 cm

Age: 21

Location: Available across all of Poland

I’m open to:

• Fashion/editorial shoots

• Commercial & brand work

• Runway & events

• Creative collaborations

• Paid work & selective TFP

Confident, reliable, and comfortable in front of the camera.

Looking to connect with photographers, designers, brands, and agencies.

Feel free to message me directly for photos, portfolio, or booking enquiries.

https://www.instagram.com/_angel.peres?igsh=MTE5bWV6M2Jvb2hiZg%3D%3D&utm_source=qr

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text
May be an image of one or more people and eyewear
May be an image of eclipse
No photo description available.
May be an image of football and text that says 'PERES AFC 12'

✨ TWARZE – a Casting Agency with Experience ✨
For 12 years we have been supporting commercial, film, and TV productions.
Our database includes over 25,000 models, actors, and extras ready to join your project.

📸 Looking for faces for a photo shoot?

items.text:
CASTING DO REKLAMY PRODUKTU HIGIENICZNEGO
Poszukujemy dwóch kobiet do udziału w kampanii reklamowej produktu higienicznego.

Kogo szukamy?

🔹 Nastolatka (ok. 15–18 lat)�🔹 Kobieta w wieku 25–32 lata

Wymagania:

* naturalność i swoboda przed kamerą

* umiejętność wyrażania emocji (zakłopotanie, radość, ulga, pewność siebie)

* dobra prezencja i zadbany wygląd

* komunikatywność i otwartość

* mile widziane doświadczenie w pracy przed kamerą (nie jest wymagane)

Oferta płatna

Więcej informacji odnośnie materiałów które należy przesłać PRIV 

Zapraszamy do udziału! 🌿

sharedPost.text:
🖐️ TYLKO 5 DNI DO KOŃCA! TO JUŻ OSTATNIA PROSTA! ⏳🔥

Czujecie te emocje? My bardzo! 🥰 Do zamknięcia listy zgłoszeń w Ogólnopolskim Konkursie Piosenki On-Line „Dźwięki Miłości 2026” pozostało już tylko 5 dni! 🕒🎶

To idealny moment, aby:
🎬 Nagrać swoje finałowe wykonanie (pamiętajcie, liczą się szczere emocje! ❤️).
📝 Wypełnić formularz na naszej stronie.
🚀 Kliknąć „Wyślij” i dać sobie szansę na muzyczną przygodę!

Nie czekajcie na niedzielny wieczór, serwery lubią płatać figle, a Wasz talent zasługuje na to, by dotrzeć do nas bez żadnych przeszkód! ✨🎙️ Pokażcie nam swoją wizję miłości i stańcie do walki o wspaniałe nagrody! 🏆🌈

Zegar tyka... ⏳ Czy Twój głos jest już gotowy, by zachwycić nasze jury? 🎤🎸

🔗 Zapisz się tutaj: https://magiczne-melodie.pl/dzwieki-milosci-zapisz-sie/
📜 Regulamin: https://magiczne-melodie.pl/dzwieki-milosci-regulamin/

Dajcie znać w komentarzach, na jakim etapie są Wasze przygotowania! 🎹👇

#DźwiękiMiłości2026 #KonkursPiosenki #Ostatnie5Dni #Śpiewamy #Wokalista #MuzykaOnLine #Pasja #Zgłoszenia #Talent #PiosenkaOMiłości

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 42 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

Call time is 9 AM and will be around 4 PM. Breakfast and lunch will be provided. All background will be credited on IMDB, FilmFreeway, and Mubi. Unpaid. To participate, email Cstoddard@quailbell.com.

items.text:
The Vertical Revolution: How a $30 Billion Format is Reshaping Hollywood's Future

I have witnessed the tectonic shifts of this industry for over four decades. As a working SAG-AFTRA actor for 40 years and a branding and audition specialist coaching talent in Hollywood for the last 18, I’ve had a front-row seat to history. I’ve navigated the rise of cable television, which redefined premium content. I’ve lived through the streaming revolution, which shattered distribution models and turned the industry inside out.

But what I am witnessing right now—this explosion of vertical content—eclipses them both.

This isn’t just a trend. It is a seismic, ground-up restructuring of how audiences consume stories and how careers are built. We are witnessing the birth of a new medium, and I have never—in 40 years—seen an opportunity this vast, this immediate, or this revolutionary. The game has changed again, but this time, the rules haven't just been rewritten; they've been demolished.

Welcome to The Vertical Revolution. We are standing at the precipice of a $30 Billion format that is reshaping Hollywood's future.

Vertical films—once dismissed as a social media novelty—have exploded into a dominant economic force, fundamentally altering how Hollywood creates and distributes content. Netflix is launching a dedicated vertical division. Multiple streaming platforms now exist solely for 9:16 content. The reach of these projects is staggering. When you book a vertical, your face isn't just seen across the United States and its 350 million viewers—these productions are engineered for global domination, specifically targeting China and India, whose combined populations approach 3 billion people.

That means your work can literally reach billions of screens across the planet overnight.

Make no mistake: The major studios are all-in. They are enlisting A-list producers, writers, and talent to develop premium vertical content for this worldwide audience. The question is no longer if this format will take over, but who will be working in it.

I haven't been watching this trend from the sidelines—I’ve been living it. I have personally booked five verticals, and select students of mine have booked upwards of 30 projects combined. We are proof that the opportunities are not just real—they are accessible, and they are happening right now.

If you are not jumping on this bandwagon, you are not just missing a trend—you are missing the single biggest expansion of working opportunities for actors in a generation.

As your branding and marketing coach, I don’t just report on the news—I provide the roadmap to navigate this new landscape and claim your place in it. I will teach you exactly where to find these auditions. I will show you how to directly connect with the producers and casting directors who are greenlighting these projects right now. I will coach you on the nuanced techniques required to audition for verticals—skills that differ radically from traditional TV and film.

And it doesn’t stop at booking the job. I will show you how to leverage your vertical credits on social media for maximum exposure, and how to strategically negotiate your pay, your transportation, and your billing status.

The industry is pivoting to the vertical format. The train is leaving the station.

I am here to ensure you are on it—and that you profit from it.

Let's build your brand for the future of film.

Visit KentKasper.net to get started. The revolution is here. Don't watch it from the outside.

items.text:
*HASTER*

Vi har fået nogle afbud til optagelser i morgen, og vil derfor høre om der er nogen der har lyst til at være med på optagelser i morgen i KBH K.

Vi skal lave en brandfilm for dansk fodboldklub.

Optagelserne finder sted mellem kl. 11.30 og 16.00 i København K.

Man skal være over 21 år. 

Jobbet er lønnet med 500 DKK. 

Send gerne en mail med billede, alder og telefon nummer, hvis der interesseret - så vender jeg tilbage hvis det bliver aktuelt :) 

statist@baconcph.com

De bedste hilsner,
Nana

**Dato for audition:** 31. januar 2026
**Sted:** Djurslands Folkehøjskole, Drammelstrupvej 15, Tirstrup, 8400 Ebeltoft

Tilmeld dig her: https://www.djfh.dk/auditions/ 🌙

items.text:
Dieser Workshop ist kein Motivationsevent.
Er ist eine intensive, interaktive Session, in der du konkret an deiner Ausrichtung arbeitest.

Vier Stunden.
Mit Fokus.
Mit Strategie.
Mit Umsetzung.

Bis 28.02 erhältst du ihn für 79 € statt 129 €.

Wenn du bereit bist, deine Karriere nicht mehr zufällig zu betreiben, sondern bewusst zu gestalten, dann ist das dein Moment.
Kommentiere mit ❤️ für den Link.

items.summary:
Dieser Workshop ist kein Motivationsevent.
Er ist eine intensive, interaktive Session, in der du konkret an deiner Ausrichtung arbeitest.

Vier Stunden.
Mit Fokus.
Mit Strategie.
Mit Umsetzung.

Bis 28.02 erhältst du ihn für 79 € statt 129 €.

Wenn du bereit bist, deine Karriere nicht mehr zufällig zu betreiben, sondern bewusst zu gestalten, dann ist das dein Moment.
Kommentiere mit ❤️ für den Link.

Jonathanabailey1@outlook.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID MUSIC VIDEO (LONDON)**

Male actor required for a paid, one-day apocalyptic-themed music video shoot in central London this spring.

Reference photo from Terminator 2. The scene before LA is nuked. This short film will be set in an empty post-apocalyptic London city (without the nukes).

• One-character shoot
• Non-speaking role
• Playing age: 20–28
• Must be confident on rollerblades or roller skates
• Ideally 5'8" or taller

To apply, please DM:
1. One headshot
2. A video showreel. Please note, submissions without a showreel will not be considered.

Shortlisting will take place over the next month. All applicants will be contacted once the shortlist is finalised. Thanks.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of frisbee and grass

topComments.text: Hey Travis, this looks brilliant. Id love to be involved, for some reason your account doesnt allow direct message. Could you give me an email address? cheers.
I could be good for this.

items.text:
**"ചന്ദനക്കുളിർ ചൂടി വരും കാറ്റ് പോലും ഇന്ന് മാസ് ആയി വീശുന്നു… 🔥
കാരണം അത് ജയൻ അങ്കിളിന്റെ ഓർമ്മകൾ കൊണ്ടാണ്!
സ്ക്രീനിൽ എത്തിയാൽ സിംഹം… 🦁
സംസാരിച്ചാൽ ഇടിമുഴക്കം… ⚡
നടന്നാൽ തന്നെ സ്റ്റൈൽ… 🔥
കാലം കടന്നാലും കരുത്ത് മങ്ങില്ല…
മലയാള സിനിമയുടെ യഥാർത്ഥ മാസ് രാജാവ് — നമ്മുടെ ജയൻ അങ്കിൾ! ❤️👑"**
#Jayan #MassKing #EvergreenHero #MalayalamCinema #Legend

**Hi everyone!**
I’m currently working on my final project about how actors are impacted by the menstrual cycle, and I’m looking for participants to complete a short anonymous questionnaire.

If you’re an actor and you menstruate (or have menstruated), I would really appreciate your insight.

**Please read the attached information sheet before completing the questionnaire.**
Both documents are attached below.

It only takes a few minutes and would massively help my research.

Thank you so much! ❤️

items.text: Can I just say (as apparently it's not clear to many on here) that professional  actors do not work for experience, exposure, credits or a copy of the project. Please show respect and offer a decent rate for the job just as you would with any other professional engagement

topComments.text: Professional actors work for what they find of value. Not one person can determine what we work for. Some of us do volunteer, because we like the networking and sometimes that networking will bring towards opportunity that is more valuable than one small monetary payment. With that said, when somebody volunteers such as an actor you have to make sure you make it conducive for respecting that actors time.

But we do though? Often times working for free on small projects that will never turn a profit is the only way to get much needed experience and credits and get into the industry proper, for everyone involved.

Hello all, I’m in need of some voice over artists for a large project happing in March/April.  

Must be from Wales as I need Welsh accents.  Half the project is in Welsh and half in English (Welsh accent).  

Recording will be taking place at my studio in central Liverpool.  If you’re local and free for the above shoot me a message.  The project will take place over multiple sessions so quite a bit of work going if you’re interested!

topComments.text: Hi James. I’m a professional VO and I have some good contacts with experienced pro Welsh VOs but they aren’t based locally. Would you be open to a remote connection with VOs who have broadcast quality home studios and are very experienced with remote sessions? If so I’ll be happy to pass on their details.
Tesni Docherty-Bowen Any good for you? Xx

items.text:
Casting call!!!
Short film

Passion project, (unpaid) but percentage of any profits will be agreed.

Festival submissions

Filmed in Lytham, Lancashire. 

Logline

A troubled man returns to the seaside town where a tragedy destroyed more than just his life, confronting a figure from his past in a haunting search for forgiveness and closure and the biggest question, is Redemption always attainable, or is something you have to live without. 

Just One More is a gritty, character-driven short film set on the Lytham seafront. The story follows Shawn, a man burdened by guilt and regret, as he meets Rob, someone from his past connected to a tragic event that changed both their lives. Through intense dialogue and fragmented memories, the film explores themes of addiction, blame, grief, and redemption, culminating in a powerful psychological twist.

The film has a gritty, realistic tone with strong emotional performances and a grounded British setting. We are looking for actors who can deliver subtle, naturalistic performances and convey deep internal conflict.

 

Rachel 

Age Range: mid 20s to mid-30s

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: Open

Description:

A silent or minimal-dialogue role representing family and continuity. She appears  with a pram and young child, triggering Rob’s emotional breakdown and symbolising what he lost. She then has a devastating emotional breakdown, will include an action scene as she attacks the lead protagonist.

Performance Notes:

This role relies on subtle presence, naturalism and raw emotion. No heavy dialogue required.

MELISSA

Age Range: Mid–20s to early 30s

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: Open

Accent: Northern / British (flexible depending on casting)

Description:

Melissa is Shawn’s partner and represents the life he could have had. She is warm, playful, and emotionally open, with a natural charm and energy. In the present day, she appears briefly but symbolically, embodying love, hope, and what was lost. In flashbacks, she is caring but frustrated by Shawn’s drinking and reckless behaviour.

I'm aiming to get this short film shot within the next two weeks. It is only approximately 5 minutes long and requires minimal dialogue.

items.text:
I am looking for a student to join me on a YouTube project in London 🌆

The role involves approaching people in the street, asking a set of prepared questions on camera 🎤, and having short, natural conversations. It is light, fun, and engaging work, but you should feel confident speaking to strangers and comfortable on camera 🙂

You should be a native English speaker (or very close), cheerful, outgoing, and positive ✨

Filming sessions are usually 6 to 8 hours per day ⏰ and this will be an ongoing project.

I offer £13 per hour (ONO) 💷 plus paid lunch 🍔

If this sounds like something you would enjoy, please send me a DM with a short introduction about yourself 📩

items.text:
Hello all! We are a group of CU Denver Student filmmakers shooting a project March 20th-22nd. 

**TITLE:** The Last Supper 

**GENRE:** Psychological Horror 

**LOGLINE:** A young woman's first dinner with her wealthy fiancee's family reveals a disturbing ritual.

**ROLES:**

*Evelyn Hernandez* (20's, Latina, Female): A young Latina woman stepping into her fiancee's world for the first time. Evelyn is confident, strong, kind, intelligent, and deeply in love. Everything a family could possibly ask for...if she fits the mold.

*Andrew O'Neill* (20's, White, Male) Evelyn's charming, pristine fiancee. He knows exactly how to make Evelyn feel safe. Raised in a family that values tradition above all else.

*Nicole O'Neill* (40's-60's, White, Female): The O'Neill family's cold, controlling matriarch. A mother who values tradition, appearances, and 'what's best'.

*Bruce O'Neill *(40s-60s, White, Male): The O'Neill family's smug and detached patriarch.

*Milan Garcia* (20's-40's, Latina, Female): Older Latina woman and maid for the O'Neill family. Doesn't say much, but she is not complacent.

**Director/Writer**: Bella Urrutia 

**Producer**: Christine Galvez 

**Production Type:** Student Film 

**Contact Information**: Please contact by email christinegalve.zfilms@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (8-10 minutes)

**Compensation**: Unpaid

**Union Status:** Non-Union 

**Audition Information**: Auditions via self tape only, reviewing and casting will be finalized early March 

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th-22nd

**Filming Location**: Denver/Wheat Ridge area, some locations subject to change

**If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link:**

*Audition Form: *https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeiTpaVjnaciNRaruclFMvJFpIAM4pICGlnKLgbNaeYe9wMNw/viewform?usp=header* *

*Sides:*

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/181sc9BycsKa9u3_ixd-H6Zj4Ms7e1VlP?usp=sharing 

**Any further inquiries please feel free to email.**

items.text:
**TITLE**: The Jackal’s Office

**GENRE**: Drama

**LOGLINE**: Set in a bureaucratic afterlife, The Jackal’s Office is a take on the weighing of the heart ceremony with the Egyptian god, Anubis.

**ROLES**:

**JACK**- M, 20s-40s. Tailored, forthright, weigher of hearts.

**MILO**- M, 20s. Gruff, self-regarding, recently deceased.

**Production Company**: Poison Ink Productions, Dir. Aiden Villarreal

**Production Type**: Short Film

**Contact Information**: poisoninkproductions@gmail.com

**Run Time**: Short

**Compensation**: Unpaid. Reel footage, meals, and snacks provided.

items.text:
Hello, my name is Chantelle and I am a Headliner Booker for Lime Entertainment. We are currently looking for troupes that highlight local culture across several destinations for Cruise Ship Opportunities. This is** not** a casting call, we are searching for established acts that are performance ready. Please email promo materials to chantelle@lime.inc with the location in the email subject line.

**Malta **

💃🏻 🎤 Troupes of up to 10 musicians, dancers and other performers for a 1.5-2 hour cultural performance. 

📍 Must be a located in Malta. You will join the ship, perform, then disembark. 

💰 Payment is $3000USD 

📅 Performance start April 2nd with opportunity to become a weekly engagement 

**Tenerife **

💃🏻 🎤 Troupes of up to 10 musicians, dancers and other performers for a 1.5-2 hour cultural performance. 

📍 Must be a located in Tenerife. You will join the ship, perform, then disembark. 

💰 Payment is $3000USD 

**Lisbon **

💃🏻 🎤 Troupes of up to 10 musicians, dancers and other performers for a 45 minute cultural performance performed 3 times in the evening. 

📍 Must be a located in Lisbon. You will join the ship, perform, then disembark. 

💰 Payment is $2500USD

📅 Performance March 10th

**Hong Kong **

💃🏻 🎤 Duo to a large troupe of musicians and/or dancers to perform 2 x 45 minute sets

📍 Must be a located in Hong Kong. You will join the ship, perform, then disembark. 

💰 Payment is $1600USD

📅 Performance March 6th 

**Da Nang (Vietnam) **

💃🏻 🎤 Duo to a large troupe of musicians and/or dancers to perform 2 x 45 minute sets

📍 Must be a located locally. You will join the ship, perform, then disembark. 

💰 Payment is $1600USD

📅 Performance March 4th

**Europe**

🤸 Acrobatic Duo (any combination of genders) to perform 35 minute feature show per week 

💃🏻 Must be proficient in silks and trapeze as you will join a larger production show for a short routine 

📍 Must be based in Europe 

💰 $2500 USD per week 

📅 Dates beginning May 8th with opportunities until Nov 7th. Maximum 30 day contracts

items.text:
Hi there 👋🏻😃
I’m Freya Tingley, an Australian actress keen to connect with filmmakers who are developing or heading into production on proof-of-concept shorts, features, or series.

I’m particularly interested in collaborating with legitimate, funded projects, or attaching early to strong scripts that are seeking finance.

My work includes Netflix’s Hemlock Grove, playing Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time, working with Clint Eastwood on Jersey Boys, voicing a lead role in Netflix’s DOTA, and leading six feature films including the horror titles The Sonata and Time Addicts (currently streaming on Netflix).

I can work in the US, UK, and Australia, and I’m currently based in Australia.

My showreel is available on IMDb:

imdb.me/freyatingley

If you have a project in mind — I’d love to connect!

Freya

items.text:
I’m looking for 3 actors for a short film about free will. This is a quick interview style shoot. About 30 minutes per actor.
Roles
1 female, white, 30s
1 male, Latinx, 40s
1 male, white, 40s
You will need to memorize about one page of script. It will be shot as an on camera interview.
If you are interested, DM me your headshot and a reel link if you have one, plus your availability.

🎬 Missed Our Last Webinar? Join This Week’s Free Virtual Production, VFX & AI Session

If you didn’t get a chance to attend our previous webinar, this is your opportunity to jump in.

You’re invited to a free live webinar on February 12, hosted by IDigital Creative Studio and the Academy of Volumetric Production.

Sign up Now! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’ll dive into how Virtual Production, VFX, AI, and real-time workflows are reshaping the way films are conceived, produced, and delivered today, across both independent and studio productions.

✨ We’ll also share an exclusive case study from Train Dreams, a feature film with 4 Academy Award® nominations, including Best Picture, offering a behind-the-scenes look at its Virtual Production workflow.

Free Webinar | Virtual Production, VFX & AI for Everyone

📅 February 12

⏰ Two sessions: 9:00 AM PT | 4:00 PM PT

🎥 Live · Free · Online

Save your spot! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’d love to see you there and connect live.

The Academy of Volumetric Production Team

Where Innovation Meets Entertainment

items.text:
**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

items.text:
Rytmigo går digitalt! Derfor tilbyder jeg lønnede jobs til børn der kan synge og/eller danse. Det mangler jeg:

Børn der kan synge mellem 8 - 12 år
Børn der kan danse mellem 9 - 17 år

I den forbindelse afholder jeg audition i Aalborg lørdag d. 10 Januar fra 13 - 16. Udover mig, vil der være en repræsentant fra Lille Label, som er en del af Sony. Lokationen i Aalborg sender jeg i en pm, når vi har aftalt noget endeligt. Mere info gives under audition. 

Så hvis du kender et barn der kunne tænke sig verdens fedeste fritidsjob, så send mig en mail på thomas@rytmigo.dk eller send en pb her på facebook, med lyd eller levende billeder af sang eller dans. Så aftaler vi videre derfra.  

Fremtidig indspilning af sang og video vil foregå fast i Aalborg, hovedsageligt i weekender eller ferier. Kan I ikke det, så er der ingen grund til at sende mig noget, eller melde jer til.  

Mvh
Thomas / Rytmigo

items.text:
New dates added - Dec 8-19 in Las Vegas. To book go to https://rebrand.ly/freehdsht

FREE HEADSHOT and 1-HOUR SESSION – East Summerlin, Las Vegas

Address sent automatically after booking

Hi! I’m Steve Fogarty, a Las Vegas headshot specialist and owner of EXPO TRAFFIC, where we run large-scale headshot activations for major trade shows (600-700 people over 2.5 days).

I’m currently testing new lighting setups and posing flows for upcoming conventions, and I’m looking for real people to sit for practice sessions in a more relaxed environment. In return for your time, you get a full headshot session and one professional, retouched headshot for free.

**What You Get**
* A 60–75 minute headshot session
* Multiple looks + lighting setups
* A private online gallery
* One edited, retouched image included
* Additional images optional (zero pressure)

**Examples of my retouching**

[https://rebrand.ly/retouching](https://rebrand.ly/retouching)

Why There’s a $20 Fee

It’s not a sales charge. It’s a **non-refundable security deposit and show-up guarantee** that ensures the schedule stays reliable for both of us. The $20 simply confirms your commitment to attend — and your favorite image is still included for free.

How You Get Your Image

After the session:
* We will review your images, and you'll tell me which ones are your favorites that you do not want deleted.
* I will edit and retouch your favorites, then upload them to your private gallery.
* You can download your favorite image using a coupon code (provided).
* You’re welcome to purchase extras, but it’s totally optional.

What to Expect / How to Prepare
* Arrive camera-ready (mirror + restroom available)
* Plan for 3–4 different looks
* Avoid pure white tops if possible
* Relax — I’ll guide you through every pose and expression

Safety + Professionalism
* All public areas are video security-monitored for your comfort and safety
* Private areas (bathrooms, changing areas) are never recorded
* References available by request

You can preview my work here:

[https://www.expotraffic.com/headshots/las-vegas-headshots](https://www.expotraffic.com/headshots/las-vegas-headshots)

**Location**

**East Summerlin near Rainbow & Alta**

**Exact address provided after booking.**

**Looking forward to creating something great together!**

**– Steve Fogarty**

**Owner – STEVEN JOSEPH PHOTOGRAPHY | EXPO TRAFFIC HEADSHOTS**

items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT MOCKUMENTARY FILM

We are casting speaking roles and male athlete extras for RAPID, a 10-minute mockumentary graduation film produced as part of the BA Filmmaking course at UWE Bristol.

The film will be shot in Bristol from 2nd–6th March 2026. This is a student project, unpaid with travel expenses and food provided, intended for university assessment, portfolio use, and festival submission.

STORY:

RAPID follows a small documentary crew as they capture former sprint star Ian Hitchworth’s attempted comeback through a chaotic charity race. 

Told in a deadpan mockumentary style, the film blends awkward comedy with moments of vulnerability. 

Humour comes through stillness, micro-expressions, and uncomfortable silences — very performance-led and character-driven.

SPEAKING ROLES:

SHOP CUSTOMER
Female, 60+
Small speaking role confronting Ian in the sports shop where he works. Dry, natural delivery.

SAM – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Sarcastic and cynical. Quietly undermines Ian with dry interrogation and subtle looks to camera. Comedy comes through restraint.

DUNCAN – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Slow-witted but fascinated by the camera. Emotionless, slightly odd presence. Competing in the trial with no real passion — just wants something to do.

EXTRAS:

MALE ATHLETE EXTRAS – CHANGING ROOM & RACE SCENES
Male, 18–35
Looking for male extras to play track athletes in changing room and race scenes.

Comfortable in sportswear and performing in a natural mockumentary-style environment. Strong reactions and subtle on-camera presence important.

Great opportunity to gain on-set experience, receive a screen credit, and obtain showreel material.

KEY INFO:
📍 Location: Bristol
📅 Shoot dates: 2nd–6th March 2026 (likely one day only for most roles)
💼 Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)

TO APPLY:
Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to:
📩 rapidfilm2026@gmail.com
